description:
## Goal

Implement the heading-based splitter for texts segmented by numbered or named headings (e.g. Corpus Hermeticum tractate sections, Eckhart sermons).

## Interface

```python
def split(text: str, config: dict) -> list[Chunk]
```

Reads `heading_pattern` from config; treats every line matching the pattern as a section boundary, grouping the lines that follow into the section's body.

## Behaviour

- Detect headings via `heading_pattern`.
- Each section becomes one chunk (or split into `Xa`/`Xb` if >`max_tokens`).
- Preserve heading text in `section_label` via `section_label_format`.

## Acceptance Criteria

- All headings detected; no section bodies leak across chunk boundaries
- Section labels match the configured format
- No chunk exceeds `max_tokens`
